basic_details.job_title: Mizoram PSC UDC Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 61 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Mizoram PSC UDC Recruitment 2026: Get the latest Mizoram Public Service Commission (MPSC) recruitment notification 2026 for 61 Upper Divisional Clerk (UDC) vacancies across various departments under Limited Departmental Examination (LDE) No. 14 of 2026-2027. The online application process starts immediately and the last date to apply online is 12th June 2026. Find Mizoram PSC vacancies across Mizoram on the official website https://mpsconline.mizoram.gov.in. You can also get Free Job Alert of "Upcoming Mizoram PSC UDC Recruitment 2026" notifications for freshers and experienced candidates. Als

important_dates.examination date: To be notified on MPSC website

application_fee.general_fee: As per MPSC norms (check official website for exact amount)
application_fee.details: Candidates applying for the UDC post under LDE are required to pay the prescribed application fee online through the MPSC Online Portal. If payment is made through UPI, it must be done using only the mobile number used for one-time registration. Persons with disabilities (PwD) are exempted from payment of application fees. Fee once paid is non-refundable under any circumstances.

qualification.details: This is a Limited Departmental Examination (LDE). Only in-service officers currently holding posts in the Lower Divisional Clerk (LDC) grade are eligible to apply. Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the date of notification (30-04-2026). Any candidate who does not fulfill any of the eligibility conditions at any stage of the recruitment process will be disqualified. Candidates must ensure their application is actually submitted after payment is made; otherwise their candidature claim will not be entertained. | Eligibility Conditions

selection_process: Stage 1 Limited Departmental Examination (Written) Objective/Descriptive type as per UDC LDE Syllabus available at https://tinyurl.com/UDCfor-LDE
Stage 2 Document Verification Service certificates and eligibility documents to be verified

The selection process for Mizoram PSC UDC LDE Recruitment 2026 consists of a Limited Departmental Examination (Written Examination) conducted by the Mizoram Public Service Commission. The examination syllabus is available for download on the Commission's official website at https://tinyurl.com/UDCfor-LDE. Final selection and appointment will be based on performance in the written examination as per the Mizoram Ministerial Service Rules

syllabus.details: The detailed examination syllabus for the Upper Divisional Clerk (UDC) Limited Departmental Examination is available for download on the Commission's official website. Candidates are advised to download and thoroughly go through the syllabus before preparing for the examination.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the Mizoram Public Service Commission's online portal at https://mpsconline.mizoram.gov.in. Probable applicants who have not registered in the one-time registration portal must register latest by 4:00 PM on the last date of submission of application (12-06-2026). Registered users can directly log in and apply. After payment is made, candidates must verify that their application is actually submitted; failure to do so means the candidature claim will not be entertained.

Payment via UPI must be done using only the mobile number used for one-time registration. For any queries or clarifications regarding applications and candidature, candidates may contact MPSC's Helpline No. 0389-3596493 on working days between 10:00 AM and 4:00 PM.
Documents to be kept ready (for verification at relevant stage):
Service certificate confirming regular appointment in LDC grade
Certificate of regular service period in LDC grade (7 years general / 5 years for legacy officers)
PwD Certificate issued by competent authority (if claiming fee exemption)
One-Time Registration details (mobile number used for OTR, for UPI payment)
Any other documents as required by MPSC
important_instructions: This is a Limited Departmental Examination (LDE) — only in-service LDC grade officers with the prescribed regular service are eligible; others need not apply. Candidates who have not registered on the MPSC one-time registration portal must register latest by 4:00 PM on 12-06-2026 before submitting the application. After making payment, candidates must verify that their application is actually submitted; otherwise their candidature claim will not be entertained. If paying via UPI, use only the mobile number registered during one-time registration. Persons with disabilities are exempted from payment of application fees; fee once paid is non-refundable under any circumstances. Canvassing (insawipui) directly or indirectly by a candidate will result in disqualification of candidature. All particulars and details mentioned in the application must be complete and correct; applications not specifying required information are liable to be rejected. Any candidate who does not fulfill any eligibility condition on verification at any stage of the recruitment process will be disqualified. The examination syllabus is available for download at https://tinyurl.com/UDCfor-LDE on the MPSC official website. For queries/clarifications, contact MPSC Helpline No. 0389-3596493 on working days between 10:00 AM and 4:00 PM.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Mizoram PSC UDC LDE Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to complete One‑Time Registration and submit the online application for Mizoram PSC UDC Limited Departmental Examination 2026 is 12 June 2026 up to 4:00 PM.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are released under Mizoram PSC UDC LDE 2026?
faq.answer: The Mizoram Public Service Commission has notified a total of 61 Upper Divisional Clerk (UDC) Group B (Non‑Gazetted) vacancies across 11 departments of the Government of Mizoram under LDE No. 14 of 2026‑2027.

faq.question: Q3. Who is eligible to apply for Mizoram PSC UDC LDE Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Only in‑service officers currently holding posts in the Lower Divisional Clerk (LDC) grade on a regular basis and having the prescribed years of regular service as per Mizoram Ministerial Service Rules, 2021 are eligible to apply; direct outsiders cannot apply for this Limited Departmental Examination.

faq.question: Q4. What is the required length of service in the LDC grade for UDC LDE 2026?
faq.answer: In general, candidates must have completed at least 7 years of regular service in the LDC grade, while “legacy” officers who were already in LDC posts on the date the extant rules were notified require 5 years of qualifying service under the Mizoram Ministerial Service Rules, 2021.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for Mizoram PSC UDC LDE Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online only through the Mizoram Public Service Commission’s online portal at https://mpsconline.mizoram.gov.in ; no offline or hard‑copy applications will be accepted for this examination.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for Mizoram PSC UDC LDE 2026 and who is exempt?
faq.answer: Candidates must pay the prescribed application fee online as per MPSC norms, but persons with disabilities are fully exempt from paying the fee; once paid, the fee is non‑refundable in all cases.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for Mizoram PSC UDC LDE Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process consists of a Limited Departmental Written Examination conducted by MPSC followed by document verification of service and eligibility certificates, and final appointment is based on performance in the written exam as per Mizoram Ministerial Service Rules, 2021.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the Mizoram PSC UDC LDE 2026 syllabus?
faq.answer: The detailed syllabus for the Upper Divisional Clerk Limited Departmental Examination can be downloaded from the official link provided by MPSC, accessible via the Commission’s website at the short URL mentioned in the notification for UDC LDE.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for Mizoram PSC UDC LDE Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to complete One‑Time Registration and submit the online application for Mizoram PSC UDC Limited Departmental Examination 2026 is 12 June 2026 up to 4:00 PM.
